title: Minecraft in AI's Horizon
description: A Texture Pack made with DouBao AI.
body:
**Minecraft in AI's Horizon**是一个对MC添加了更加高清写实的贴图的材质包，使用了豆包辅助制作。目前仅添加了二十余张贴图，但我会保持更新。_制作初衷仅为娱乐，可能略显劣质，还请见谅_。目前仅发布在Modrinth。

**Minecraft in AI's Horizon** is a Texture Pack that adds high-definition textures to Minecraft, made with DouBao AI. Right now it only has about 20 new textures, but I'll keep update. _I just made this for fun, so it maybe not so good.I'm sorry_.Only Available on Modrinth.
